nasb.text: ‘But if he struck him down with an iron object, so that he died, he is a murderer; the murderer shall surely be put to death.

esv.text: “But if he struck him down with an iron object, so that he died, he is a murderer. The murderer shall be put to death.

cnv.text: “‘如果人用鐵器打人，以致把人打死，他就是故意殺人的；故意殺人的必被處死。

ccb.text: “‘倘若有人用铁器打人致死，他就是故意杀人，必须被处死。
